entries.title: Made on a tiny budget earned millions: Jurassic Park First $1 Billion
entries.hook: Made on a tiny budget earned millions:
stories: Jurassic Park was the first film to reach $1 billion worldwide. It cost only $63 million. Today over 50 films have crossed $1 billion but 85% were released after 2010.
The Super Mario Bros Movie earned $1.36 billion the highest-grossing video game adaptation ever. It surpassed Frozen and Minions despite mixed critical reviews.
The highest-grossing DC film is Aquaman at $1.15 billion. The entire DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films far behind the MCU's $29 billion.

entries.title: This movie broke every record: Blair Witch Made 4000x Budget
entries.hook: This movie broke every record:
stories: The Blair Witch Project cost $60000 and earned $248 million a return of 4133 times its budget. It remains the most profitable film ever by budget-to-box-office ratio.
Titanic cost $200 million the most expensive film ever at the time. It was predicted to be a disaster but earned $2.2 billion holding the record for 12 years.
The MCU has earned over $29 billion across 33 films. The DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films. Endgame alone earned more than the entire Snyder trilogy.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: John Carter Biggest Bomb
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: John Carter cost $350 million but earned only $284 million. Disney lost an estimated $200 million making it the biggest box office bomb in history.
The Dark Knight earned $997 million just $3 million short of $1 billion. It was the highest-grossing film of 2008. Ledger's posthumous Oscar drove massive turnout.
The highest-grossing DC film is Aquaman at $1.15 billion. The entire DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films far behind the MCU's $29 billion.

entries.title: This box office record still stands: Endgame Made $1 Billion in 5 Days
entries.hook: This box office record still stands:
stories: Avengers Endgame earned $1.2 billion in its opening weekend worldwide. It crossed $1 billion in just 5 days the fastest any film has reached that milestone.
Gone With the Wind earned $393 million in 1939. Adjusted for inflation that is approximately $4.3 billion today making it the highest-grossing film of all time.
The Harry Potter series earned $7.7 billion across 8 films averaging $962 million each. Deathly Hallows Part 2 was the most successful at $1.3 billion.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: Avatar Is the Highest-Grossing Film
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: Avatar earned $2.92 billion worldwide the highest-grossing film ever. It held the record for a decade until Endgame briefly surpassed it. Avatar regained the title after a 2021 China re-release.
Gone With the Wind earned $393 million in 1939. Adjusted for inflation that is approximately $4.3 billion today making it the highest-grossing film of all time.
Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny cost $387 million and earned only $384 million. It was one of the biggest bombs in history losing over $100 million for Disney.

entries.title: This box office record still stands: Star Wars Saved Fox
entries.hook: This box office record still stands:
stories: 20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.
Jurassic Park cost $63 million one of the lowest budgets for any billion-dollar film. Its budget-to-box-office ratio of 16:1 makes it one of the most profitable ever.
Pirates of the Caribbean At World's End cost $300 million one of the most expensive films ever made. Most of the budget went to CGI and actor salaries.

entries.title: This box office record still stands: The Dark Knight Missed $1 Billion

stories: The Dark Knight earned $997 million just $3 million short of $1 billion. It was the highest-grossing film of 2008. Ledger's posthumous Oscar drove massive turnout.
Spider-Man No Way Home earned $1.9 billion during COVID-19. It was the first film to cross $1 billion since 2019 saving theater chains on the verge of closing.
The MCU has earned over $29 billion across 33 films. The DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films. Endgame alone earned more than the entire Snyder trilogy.

stories: Spider-Man No Way Home earned $1.9 billion during COVID-19. It was the first film to cross $1 billion since 2019 saving theater chains on the verge of closing.
In 2020 China's box office surpassed North America for the first time. China earned $2.9 billion vs $2.2 billion. Chinese films now regularly outperform Hollywood in their market.
Jurassic Park cost $63 million one of the lowest budgets for any billion-dollar film. Its budget-to-box-office ratio of 16:1 makes it one of the most profitable ever.

entries.title: This box office record still stands: Paranormal Activity Cost $15000

stories: Paranormal Activity was made for $15000 and earned $193 million a return of 12867 times its budget. The franchise has earned over $890 million total.
Spider-Man No Way Home earned $1.9 billion during COVID-19. It was the first film to cross $1 billion since 2019 saving theater chains on the verge of closing.
The highest-grossing DC film is Aquaman at $1.15 billion. The entire DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films far behind the MCU's $29 billion.

entries.title: You won't believe how much this movie earned: Avatar Is the Highest-Grossing Film
entries.hook: You won't believe how much this movie earned:
stories: Avatar earned $2.92 billion worldwide the highest-grossing film ever. It held the record for a decade until Endgame briefly surpassed it. Avatar regained the title after a 2021 China re-release.
Star Wars The Force Awakens cost $447 million including marketing the most expensive ever. Endgame cost $356 million and Avatar 2 cost $350 million.
Jurassic Park cost $63 million one of the lowest budgets for any billion-dollar film. Its budget-to-box-office ratio of 16:1 makes it one of the most profitable ever.

stories: The MCU has earned over $29 billion across 33 films. The DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films. Endgame alone earned more than the entire Snyder trilogy.
The Harry Potter series earned $7.7 billion across 8 films averaging $962 million each. Deathly Hallows Part 2 was the most successful at $1.3 billion.
Jurassic Park cost $63 million one of the lowest budgets for any billion-dollar film. Its budget-to-box-office ratio of 16:1 makes it one of the most profitable ever.

entries.title: This movie broke every record: Blair Witch Made 4000x Budget
entries.hook: This movie broke every record:
stories: The Blair Witch Project cost $60000 and earned $248 million a return of 4133 times its budget. It remains the most profitable film ever by budget-to-box-office ratio.
20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.
Spider-Man No Way Home earned $1.9 billion during COVID-19. It was the first film to cross $1 billion since 2019 saving theater chains on the verge of closing.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: Gone With the Wind Adjusted
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: Gone With the Wind earned $393 million in 1939. Adjusted for inflation that is approximately $4.3 billion today making it the highest-grossing film of all time.
In 2020 China's box office surpassed North America for the first time. China earned $2.9 billion vs $2.2 billion. Chinese films now regularly outperform Hollywood in their market.
Jurassic Park cost $63 million one of the lowest budgets for any billion-dollar film. Its budget-to-box-office ratio of 16:1 makes it one of the most profitable ever.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: Marvel vs DC Box Office
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: The MCU has earned over $29 billion across 33 films. The DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films. Endgame alone earned more than the entire Snyder trilogy.
The Super Mario Bros Movie earned $1.36 billion the highest-grossing video game adaptation ever. It surpassed Frozen and Minions despite mixed critical reviews.
Pirates of the Caribbean At World's End cost $300 million one of the most expensive films ever made. Most of the budget went to CGI and actor salaries.

Avengers Endgame earned $1.2 billion in its opening weekend worldwide. It crossed $1 billion in just 5 days the fastest any film has reached that milestone.
The Harry Potter series earned $7.7 billion across 8 films averaging $962 million each. Deathly Hallows Part 2 was the most successful at $1.3 billion.

entries.hook: This movie broke every record:
stories: Avatar earned $2.92 billion worldwide the highest-grossing film ever. It held the record for a decade until Endgame briefly surpassed it. Avatar regained the title after a 2021 China re-release.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: The Dark Knight Missed $1 Billion
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: The Dark Knight earned $997 million just $3 million short of $1 billion. It was the highest-grossing film of 2008. Ledger's posthumous Oscar drove massive turnout.
Titanic cost $200 million the most expensive film ever at the time. It was predicted to be a disaster but earned $2.2 billion holding the record for 12 years.
Pirates of the Caribbean At World's End cost $300 million one of the most expensive films ever made. Most of the budget went to CGI and actor salaries.

entries.title: You won't believe how much this movie earned: John Carter Biggest Bomb
entries.hook: You won't believe how much this movie earned:
stories: John Carter cost $350 million but earned only $284 million. Disney lost an estimated $200 million making it the biggest box office bomb in history.
Spider-Man No Way Home earned $1.9 billion during COVID-19. It was the first film to cross $1 billion since 2019 saving theater chains on the verge of closing.
Jurassic Park cost $63 million one of the lowest budgets for any billion-dollar film. Its budget-to-box-office ratio of 16:1 makes it one of the most profitable ever.

stories: Avatar earned $2.92 billion worldwide the highest-grossing film ever. It held the record for a decade until Endgame briefly surpassed it. Avatar regained the title after a 2021 China re-release.
The Blair Witch Project cost $60000 and earned $248 million a return of 4133 times its budget. It remains the most profitable film ever by budget-to-box-office ratio.
John Carter cost $350 million but earned only $284 million. Disney lost an estimated $200 million making it the biggest box office bomb in history.

entries.title: This box office record still stands: Most Expensive Movie Ever
entries.hook: This box office record still stands:
stories: Star Wars The Force Awakens cost $447 million including marketing the most expensive ever. Endgame cost $356 million and Avatar 2 cost $350 million.
Jurassic Park cost $63 million one of the lowest budgets for any billion-dollar film. Its budget-to-box-office ratio of 16:1 makes it one of the most profitable ever.
Pirates of the Caribbean At World's End cost $300 million one of the most expensive films ever made. Most of the budget went to CGI and actor salaries.

entries.title: This box office record still stands: Star Wars Saved Fox
entries.hook: This box office record still stands:
stories: 20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.
The Super Mario Bros Movie earned $1.36 billion the highest-grossing video game adaptation ever. It surpassed Frozen and Minions despite mixed critical reviews.
Pirates of the Caribbean At World's End cost $300 million one of the most expensive films ever made. Most of the budget went to CGI and actor salaries.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: Paranormal Activity Cost $15000
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: Paranormal Activity was made for $15000 and earned $193 million a return of 12867 times its budget. The franchise has earned over $890 million total.
The MCU has earned over $29 billion across 33 films. The DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films. Endgame alone earned more than the entire Snyder trilogy.

entries.title: This movie broke every record: No Way Home Saved Theaters
entries.hook: This movie broke every record:
stories: Spider-Man No Way Home earned $1.9 billion during COVID-19. It was the first film to cross $1 billion since 2019 saving theater chains on the verge of closing.
Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny cost $387 million and earned only $384 million. It was one of the biggest bombs in history losing over $100 million for Disney.
Star Wars The Force Awakens cost $447 million including marketing the most expensive ever. Endgame cost $356 million and Avatar 2 cost $350 million.

stories: Jurassic Park was the first film to reach $1 billion worldwide. It cost only $63 million. Today over 50 films have crossed $1 billion but 85% were released after 2010.
Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny cost $387 million and earned only $384 million. It was one of the biggest bombs in history losing over $100 million for Disney.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: Endgame Made $1 Billion in 5 Days
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: Avengers Endgame earned $1.2 billion in its opening weekend worldwide. It crossed $1 billion in just 5 days the fastest any film has reached that milestone.
Titanic cost $200 million the most expensive film ever at the time. It was predicted to be a disaster but earned $2.2 billion holding the record for 12 years.
Pirates of the Caribbean At World's End cost $300 million one of the most expensive films ever made. Most of the budget went to CGI and actor salaries.

entries.title: You won't believe how much this movie earned: The Dark Knight Missed $1 Billion
entries.hook: You won't believe how much this movie earned:
stories: The Dark Knight earned $997 million just $3 million short of $1 billion. It was the highest-grossing film of 2008. Ledger's posthumous Oscar drove massive turnout.
The Super Mario Bros Movie earned $1.36 billion the highest-grossing video game adaptation ever. It surpassed Frozen and Minions despite mixed critical reviews.
The highest-grossing DC film is Aquaman at $1.15 billion. The entire DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films far behind the MCU's $29 billion.

entries.title: This movie broke every record: Blair Witch Made 4000x Budget
entries.hook: This movie broke every record:
stories: The Blair Witch Project cost $60000 and earned $248 million a return of 4133 times its budget. It remains the most profitable film ever by budget-to-box-office ratio.
The Harry Potter series earned $7.7 billion across 8 films averaging $962 million each. Deathly Hallows Part 2 was the most successful at $1.3 billion.
Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny cost $387 million and earned only $384 million. It was one of the biggest bombs in history losing over $100 million for Disney.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: Avatar Is the Highest-Grossing Film
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: Avatar earned $2.92 billion worldwide the highest-grossing film ever. It held the record for a decade until Endgame briefly surpassed it. Avatar regained the title after a 2021 China re-release.
20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.
The highest-grossing DC film is Aquaman at $1.15 billion. The entire DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films far behind the MCU's $29 billion.

entries.title: This movie broke every record: Titanic Predicted Flop
entries.hook: This movie broke every record:
stories: Titanic cost $200 million the most expensive film ever at the time. It was predicted to be a disaster but earned $2.2 billion holding the record for 12 years.
Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny cost $387 million and earned only $384 million. It was one of the biggest bombs in history losing over $100 million for Disney.
The Super Mario Bros Movie earned $1.36 billion the highest-grossing video game adaptation ever. It surpassed Frozen and Minions despite mixed critical reviews.

entries.title: This box office record still stands: Blair Witch Made 4000x Budget
entries.hook: This box office record still stands:
stories: The Blair Witch Project cost $60000 and earned $248 million a return of 4133 times its budget. It remains the most profitable film ever by budget-to-box-office ratio.
20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.
In 2020 China's box office surpassed North America for the first time. China earned $2.9 billion vs $2.2 billion. Chinese films now regularly outperform Hollywood in their market.

Pirates of the Caribbean At World's End cost $300 million one of the most expensive films ever made. Most of the budget went to CGI and actor salaries.

entries.title: Made on a tiny budget earned millions: Avatar Is the Highest-Grossing Film
entries.hook: Made on a tiny budget earned millions:
stories: Avatar earned $2.92 billion worldwide the highest-grossing film ever. It held the record for a decade until Endgame briefly surpassed it. Avatar regained the title after a 2021 China re-release.
20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.
Titanic cost $200 million the most expensive film ever at the time. It was predicted to be a disaster but earned $2.2 billion holding the record for 12 years.

entries.title: Made on a tiny budget earned millions: Marvel vs DC Box Office
entries.hook: Made on a tiny budget earned millions:
stories: The MCU has earned over $29 billion across 33 films. The DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films. Endgame alone earned more than the entire Snyder trilogy.
The Super Mario Bros Movie earned $1.36 billion the highest-grossing video game adaptation ever. It surpassed Frozen and Minions despite mixed critical reviews.
The highest-grossing DC film is Aquaman at $1.15 billion. The entire DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films far behind the MCU's $29 billion.

entries.title: Made on a tiny budget earned millions: Avatar Is the Highest-Grossing Film
entries.hook: Made on a tiny budget earned millions:
stories: Avatar earned $2.92 billion worldwide the highest-grossing film ever. It held the record for a decade until Endgame briefly surpassed it. Avatar regained the title after a 2021 China re-release.
The Blair Witch Project cost $60000 and earned $248 million a return of 4133 times its budget. It remains the most profitable film ever by budget-to-box-office ratio.
20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.

The MCU has earned over $29 billion across 33 films. The DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films. Endgame alone earned more than the entire Snyder trilogy.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: Avatar Is the Highest-Grossing Film
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: Avatar earned $2.92 billion worldwide the highest-grossing film ever. It held the record for a decade until Endgame briefly surpassed it. Avatar regained the title after a 2021 China re-release.
Paranormal Activity was made for $15000 and earned $193 million a return of 12867 times its budget. The franchise has earned over $890 million total.
Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny cost $387 million and earned only $384 million. It was one of the biggest bombs in history losing over $100 million for Disney.

stories: Jurassic Park was the first film to reach $1 billion worldwide. It cost only $63 million. Today over 50 films have crossed $1 billion but 85% were released after 2010.
Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny cost $387 million and earned only $384 million. It was one of the biggest bombs in history losing over $100 million for Disney.
The Super Mario Bros Movie earned $1.36 billion the highest-grossing video game adaptation ever. It surpassed Frozen and Minions despite mixed critical reviews.

entries.title: You won't believe how much this movie earned: Star Wars Saved Fox
entries.hook: You won't believe how much this movie earned:
stories: 20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.
The Dark Knight earned $997 million just $3 million short of $1 billion. It was the highest-grossing film of 2008. Ledger's posthumous Oscar drove massive turnout.
The Harry Potter series earned $7.7 billion across 8 films averaging $962 million each. Deathly Hallows Part 2 was the most successful at $1.3 billion.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: Star Wars Saved Fox

Star Wars The Force Awakens cost $447 million including marketing the most expensive ever. Endgame cost $356 million and Avatar 2 cost $350 million.

Jurassic Park was the first film to reach $1 billion worldwide. It cost only $63 million. Today over 50 films have crossed $1 billion but 85% were released after 2010.
Jurassic Park cost $63 million one of the lowest budgets for any billion-dollar film. Its budget-to-box-office ratio of 16:1 makes it one of the most profitable ever.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: John Carter Biggest Bomb
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: John Carter cost $350 million but earned only $284 million. Disney lost an estimated $200 million making it the biggest box office bomb in history.
20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.
The Harry Potter series earned $7.7 billion across 8 films averaging $962 million each. Deathly Hallows Part 2 was the most successful at $1.3 billion.

entries.title: This movie broke every record: Gone With the Wind Adjusted
entries.hook: This movie broke every record:
stories: Gone With the Wind earned $393 million in 1939. Adjusted for inflation that is approximately $4.3 billion today making it the highest-grossing film of all time.
The MCU has earned over $29 billion across 33 films. The DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films. Endgame alone earned more than the entire Snyder trilogy.
Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny cost $387 million and earned only $384 million. It was one of the biggest bombs in history losing over $100 million for Disney.

entries.title: Made on a tiny budget earned millions: Avatar Is the Highest-Grossing Film
entries.hook: Made on a tiny budget earned millions:
stories: Avatar earned $2.92 billion worldwide the highest-grossing film ever. It held the record for a decade until Endgame briefly surpassed it. Avatar regained the title after a 2021 China re-release.
The Harry Potter series earned $7.7 billion across 8 films averaging $962 million each. Deathly Hallows Part 2 was the most successful at $1.3 billion.
In 2020 China's box office surpassed North America for the first time. China earned $2.9 billion vs $2.2 billion. Chinese films now regularly outperform Hollywood in their market.

entries.title: This movie broke every record: Avatar Is the Highest-Grossing Film
entries.hook: This movie broke every record:
stories: Avatar earned $2.92 billion worldwide the highest-grossing film ever. It held the record for a decade until Endgame briefly surpassed it. Avatar regained the title after a 2021 China re-release.
Jurassic Park was the first film to reach $1 billion worldwide. It cost only $63 million. Today over 50 films have crossed $1 billion but 85% were released after 2010.
The highest-grossing DC film is Aquaman at $1.15 billion. The entire DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films far behind the MCU's $29 billion.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: Endgame Made $1 Billion in 5 Days
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: Avengers Endgame earned $1.2 billion in its opening weekend worldwide. It crossed $1 billion in just 5 days the fastest any film has reached that milestone.
20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.
Jurassic Park cost $63 million one of the lowest budgets for any billion-dollar film. Its budget-to-box-office ratio of 16:1 makes it one of the most profitable ever.

stories: John Carter cost $350 million but earned only $284 million. Disney lost an estimated $200 million making it the biggest box office bomb in history.
Paranormal Activity was made for $15000 and earned $193 million a return of 12867 times its budget. The franchise has earned over $890 million total.
In 2020 China's box office surpassed North America for the first time. China earned $2.9 billion vs $2.2 billion. Chinese films now regularly outperform Hollywood in their market.

entries.title: This movie broke every record: Titanic Predicted Flop
entries.hook: This movie broke every record:
stories: Titanic cost $200 million the most expensive film ever at the time. It was predicted to be a disaster but earned $2.2 billion holding the record for 12 years.
Star Wars The Force Awakens cost $447 million including marketing the most expensive ever. Endgame cost $356 million and Avatar 2 cost $350 million.
In 2020 China's box office surpassed North America for the first time. China earned $2.9 billion vs $2.2 billion. Chinese films now regularly outperform Hollywood in their market.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: Avatar Is the Highest-Grossing Film
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: Avatar earned $2.92 billion worldwide the highest-grossing film ever. It held the record for a decade until Endgame briefly surpassed it. Avatar regained the title after a 2021 China re-release.
20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.
Star Wars The Force Awakens cost $447 million including marketing the most expensive ever. Endgame cost $356 million and Avatar 2 cost $350 million.

entries.title: You won't believe how much this movie earned: Endgame Made $1 Billion in 5 Days
entries.hook: You won't believe how much this movie earned:
stories: Avengers Endgame earned $1.2 billion in its opening weekend worldwide. It crossed $1 billion in just 5 days the fastest any film has reached that milestone.
John Carter cost $350 million but earned only $284 million. Disney lost an estimated $200 million making it the biggest box office bomb in history.
The Harry Potter series earned $7.7 billion across 8 films averaging $962 million each. Deathly Hallows Part 2 was the most successful at $1.3 billion.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: Endgame Made $1 Billion in 5 Days
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: Avengers Endgame earned $1.2 billion in its opening weekend worldwide. It crossed $1 billion in just 5 days the fastest any film has reached that milestone.
Spider-Man No Way Home earned $1.9 billion during COVID-19. It was the first film to cross $1 billion since 2019 saving theater chains on the verge of closing.
The Super Mario Bros Movie earned $1.36 billion the highest-grossing video game adaptation ever. It surpassed Frozen and Minions despite mixed critical reviews.

entries.title: This movie broke every record: Jurassic Park First $1 Billion
entries.hook: This movie broke every record:
stories: Jurassic Park was the first film to reach $1 billion worldwide. It cost only $63 million. Today over 50 films have crossed $1 billion but 85% were released after 2010.
Star Wars The Force Awakens cost $447 million including marketing the most expensive ever. Endgame cost $356 million and Avatar 2 cost $350 million.
The highest-grossing DC film is Aquaman at $1.15 billion. The entire DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films far behind the MCU's $29 billion.

entries.title: You won't believe how much this movie earned: Jurassic Park First $1 Billion
entries.hook: You won't believe how much this movie earned:
stories: Jurassic Park was the first film to reach $1 billion worldwide. It cost only $63 million. Today over 50 films have crossed $1 billion but 85% were released after 2010.
Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny cost $387 million and earned only $384 million. It was one of the biggest bombs in history losing over $100 million for Disney.
Star Wars The Force Awakens cost $447 million including marketing the most expensive ever. Endgame cost $356 million and Avatar 2 cost $350 million.

entries.title: This movie broke every record: John Carter Biggest Bomb
entries.hook: This movie broke every record:
stories: John Carter cost $350 million but earned only $284 million. Disney lost an estimated $200 million making it the biggest box office bomb in history.
20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.
Jurassic Park cost $63 million one of the lowest budgets for any billion-dollar film. Its budget-to-box-office ratio of 16:1 makes it one of the most profitable ever.

entries.title: This movie broke every record: Marvel vs DC Box Office
entries.hook: This movie broke every record:
stories: The MCU has earned over $29 billion across 33 films. The DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films. Endgame alone earned more than the entire Snyder trilogy.
The Super Mario Bros Movie earned $1.36 billion the highest-grossing video game adaptation ever. It surpassed Frozen and Minions despite mixed critical reviews.
In 2020 China's box office surpassed North America for the first time. China earned $2.9 billion vs $2.2 billion. Chinese films now regularly outperform Hollywood in their market.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: Avatar Is the Highest-Grossing Film
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: Avatar earned $2.92 billion worldwide the highest-grossing film ever. It held the record for a decade until Endgame briefly surpassed it. Avatar regained the title after a 2021 China re-release.
Jurassic Park cost $63 million one of the lowest budgets for any billion-dollar film. Its budget-to-box-office ratio of 16:1 makes it one of the most profitable ever.
The highest-grossing DC film is Aquaman at $1.15 billion. The entire DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films far behind the MCU's $29 billion.

entries.title: Made on a tiny budget earned millions: Titanic Predicted Flop
entries.hook: Made on a tiny budget earned millions:
stories: Titanic cost $200 million the most expensive film ever at the time. It was predicted to be a disaster but earned $2.2 billion holding the record for 12 years.
Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny cost $387 million and earned only $384 million. It was one of the biggest bombs in history losing over $100 million for Disney.
Pirates of the Caribbean At World's End cost $300 million one of the most expensive films ever made. Most of the budget went to CGI and actor salaries.

entries.title: This movie broke every record: Star Wars Saved Fox
entries.hook: This movie broke every record:
stories: 20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.
Jurassic Park was the first film to reach $1 billion worldwide. It cost only $63 million. Today over 50 films have crossed $1 billion but 85% were released after 2010.
The MCU has earned over $29 billion across 33 films. The DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films. Endgame alone earned more than the entire Snyder trilogy.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: Star Wars Saved Fox
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: 20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.
Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny cost $387 million and earned only $384 million. It was one of the biggest bombs in history losing over $100 million for Disney.
Pirates of the Caribbean At World's End cost $300 million one of the most expensive films ever made. Most of the budget went to CGI and actor salaries.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: Avatar Is the Highest-Grossing Film

stories: Avatar earned $2.92 billion worldwide the highest-grossing film ever. It held the record for a decade until Endgame briefly surpassed it. Avatar regained the title after a 2021 China re-release.
Gone With the Wind earned $393 million in 1939. Adjusted for inflation that is approximately $4.3 billion today making it the highest-grossing film of all time.
20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.

stories: Gone With the Wind earned $393 million in 1939. Adjusted for inflation that is approximately $4.3 billion today making it the highest-grossing film of all time.
Jurassic Park was the first film to reach $1 billion worldwide. It cost only $63 million. Today over 50 films have crossed $1 billion but 85% were released after 2010.
The Super Mario Bros Movie earned $1.36 billion the highest-grossing video game adaptation ever. It surpassed Frozen and Minions despite mixed critical reviews.

entries.title: You won't believe how much this movie earned: Paranormal Activity Cost $15000

stories: Paranormal Activity was made for $15000 and earned $193 million a return of 12867 times its budget. The franchise has earned over $890 million total.

Jurassic Park cost $63 million one of the lowest budgets for any billion-dollar film. Its budget-to-box-office ratio of 16:1 makes it one of the most profitable ever.

Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny cost $387 million and earned only $384 million. It was one of the biggest bombs in history losing over $100 million for Disney.
Star Wars The Force Awakens cost $447 million including marketing the most expensive ever. Endgame cost $356 million and Avatar 2 cost $350 million.

entries.title: This movie broke every record: Blair Witch Made 4000x Budget
entries.hook: This movie broke every record:
stories: The Blair Witch Project cost $60000 and earned $248 million a return of 4133 times its budget. It remains the most profitable film ever by budget-to-box-office ratio.
In 2020 China's box office surpassed North America for the first time. China earned $2.9 billion vs $2.2 billion. Chinese films now regularly outperform Hollywood in their market.
Pirates of the Caribbean At World's End cost $300 million one of the most expensive films ever made. Most of the budget went to CGI and actor salaries.

stories: John Carter cost $350 million but earned only $284 million. Disney lost an estimated $200 million making it the biggest box office bomb in history.
20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.
The MCU has earned over $29 billion across 33 films. The DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films. Endgame alone earned more than the entire Snyder trilogy.

entries.title: This movie broke every record: Avatar Is the Highest-Grossing Film
entries.hook: This movie broke every record:
stories: Avatar earned $2.92 billion worldwide the highest-grossing film ever. It held the record for a decade until Endgame briefly surpassed it. Avatar regained the title after a 2021 China re-release.
Spider-Man No Way Home earned $1.9 billion during COVID-19. It was the first film to cross $1 billion since 2019 saving theater chains on the verge of closing.
Jurassic Park cost $63 million one of the lowest budgets for any billion-dollar film. Its budget-to-box-office ratio of 16:1 makes it one of the most profitable ever.

entries.title: This movie broke every record: Avatar Is the Highest-Grossing Film
entries.hook: This movie broke every record:
stories: Avatar earned $2.92 billion worldwide the highest-grossing film ever. It held the record for a decade until Endgame briefly surpassed it. Avatar regained the title after a 2021 China re-release.
20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.
Jurassic Park cost $63 million one of the lowest budgets for any billion-dollar film. Its budget-to-box-office ratio of 16:1 makes it one of the most profitable ever.

entries.title: You won't believe how much this movie earned: No Way Home Saved Theaters
entries.hook: You won't believe how much this movie earned:
stories: Spider-Man No Way Home earned $1.9 billion during COVID-19. It was the first film to cross $1 billion since 2019 saving theater chains on the verge of closing.
The Harry Potter series earned $7.7 billion across 8 films averaging $962 million each. Deathly Hallows Part 2 was the most successful at $1.3 billion.
Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny cost $387 million and earned only $384 million. It was one of the biggest bombs in history losing over $100 million for Disney.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: Blair Witch Made 4000x Budget
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: The Blair Witch Project cost $60000 and earned $248 million a return of 4133 times its budget. It remains the most profitable film ever by budget-to-box-office ratio.
Jurassic Park was the first film to reach $1 billion worldwide. It cost only $63 million. Today over 50 films have crossed $1 billion but 85% were released after 2010.
In 2020 China's box office surpassed North America for the first time. China earned $2.9 billion vs $2.2 billion. Chinese films now regularly outperform Hollywood in their market.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: The Dark Knight Missed $1 Billion

Jurassic Park was the first film to reach $1 billion worldwide. It cost only $63 million. Today over 50 films have crossed $1 billion but 85% were released after 2010.
The Super Mario Bros Movie earned $1.36 billion the highest-grossing video game adaptation ever. It surpassed Frozen and Minions despite mixed critical reviews.

Avengers Endgame earned $1.2 billion in its opening weekend worldwide. It crossed $1 billion in just 5 days the fastest any film has reached that milestone.
Star Wars The Force Awakens cost $447 million including marketing the most expensive ever. Endgame cost $356 million and Avatar 2 cost $350 million.

entries.title: This box office record still stands: Endgame Made $1 Billion in 5 Days
entries.hook: This box office record still stands:
stories: Avengers Endgame earned $1.2 billion in its opening weekend worldwide. It crossed $1 billion in just 5 days the fastest any film has reached that milestone.
Titanic cost $200 million the most expensive film ever at the time. It was predicted to be a disaster but earned $2.2 billion holding the record for 12 years.
Spider-Man No Way Home earned $1.9 billion during COVID-19. It was the first film to cross $1 billion since 2019 saving theater chains on the verge of closing.

entries.title: This box office record still stands: Avatar Is the Highest-Grossing Film
entries.hook: This box office record still stands:
stories: Avatar earned $2.92 billion worldwide the highest-grossing film ever. It held the record for a decade until Endgame briefly surpassed it. Avatar regained the title after a 2021 China re-release.
Avengers Endgame earned $1.2 billion in its opening weekend worldwide. It crossed $1 billion in just 5 days the fastest any film has reached that milestone.
Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny cost $387 million and earned only $384 million. It was one of the biggest bombs in history losing over $100 million for Disney.

entries.title: This box office record still stands: Paranormal Activity Cost $15000
entries.hook: This box office record still stands:
stories: Paranormal Activity was made for $15000 and earned $193 million a return of 12867 times its budget. The franchise has earned over $890 million total.
Gone With the Wind earned $393 million in 1939. Adjusted for inflation that is approximately $4.3 billion today making it the highest-grossing film of all time.
The Super Mario Bros Movie earned $1.36 billion the highest-grossing video game adaptation ever. It surpassed Frozen and Minions despite mixed critical reviews.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: The Dark Knight Missed $1 Billion
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: The Dark Knight earned $997 million just $3 million short of $1 billion. It was the highest-grossing film of 2008. Ledger's posthumous Oscar drove massive turnout.
Spider-Man No Way Home earned $1.9 billion during COVID-19. It was the first film to cross $1 billion since 2019 saving theater chains on the verge of closing.
Pirates of the Caribbean At World's End cost $300 million one of the most expensive films ever made. Most of the budget went to CGI and actor salaries.

entries.title: Made on a tiny budget earned millions: Star Wars Saved Fox
entries.hook: Made on a tiny budget earned millions:
stories: 20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.
The Harry Potter series earned $7.7 billion across 8 films averaging $962 million each. Deathly Hallows Part 2 was the most successful at $1.3 billion.
Jurassic Park cost $63 million one of the lowest budgets for any billion-dollar film. Its budget-to-box-office ratio of 16:1 makes it one of the most profitable ever.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: Titanic Predicted Flop
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: Titanic cost $200 million the most expensive film ever at the time. It was predicted to be a disaster but earned $2.2 billion holding the record for 12 years.
The MCU has earned over $29 billion across 33 films. The DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films. Endgame alone earned more than the entire Snyder trilogy.
The highest-grossing DC film is Aquaman at $1.15 billion. The entire DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films far behind the MCU's $29 billion.

entries.title: Made on a tiny budget earned millions: Paranormal Activity Cost $15000
entries.hook: Made on a tiny budget earned millions:
stories: Paranormal Activity was made for $15000 and earned $193 million a return of 12867 times its budget. The franchise has earned over $890 million total.
Gone With the Wind earned $393 million in 1939. Adjusted for inflation that is approximately $4.3 billion today making it the highest-grossing film of all time.
Star Wars The Force Awakens cost $447 million including marketing the most expensive ever. Endgame cost $356 million and Avatar 2 cost $350 million.

entries.title: You won't believe how much this movie earned: Jurassic Park First $1 Billion
entries.hook: You won't believe how much this movie earned:
stories: Jurassic Park was the first film to reach $1 billion worldwide. It cost only $63 million. Today over 50 films have crossed $1 billion but 85% were released after 2010.
Star Wars The Force Awakens cost $447 million including marketing the most expensive ever. Endgame cost $356 million and Avatar 2 cost $350 million.
In 2020 China's box office surpassed North America for the first time. China earned $2.9 billion vs $2.2 billion. Chinese films now regularly outperform Hollywood in their market.

entries.title: This movie broke every record: Avatar Is the Highest-Grossing Film
entries.hook: This movie broke every record:
stories: Avatar earned $2.92 billion worldwide the highest-grossing film ever. It held the record for a decade until Endgame briefly surpassed it. Avatar regained the title after a 2021 China re-release.
The Blair Witch Project cost $60000 and earned $248 million a return of 4133 times its budget. It remains the most profitable film ever by budget-to-box-office ratio.
Spider-Man No Way Home earned $1.9 billion during COVID-19. It was the first film to cross $1 billion since 2019 saving theater chains on the verge of closing.

entries.title: This box office record still stands: Star Wars Saved Fox
entries.hook: This box office record still stands:
stories: 20th Century Fox was on the verge of bankruptcy in 1977. Star Wars cost $11 million and earned $775 million saving the studio. Lucas traded director fees for merchandise rights making billions.
The Dark Knight earned $997 million just $3 million short of $1 billion. It was the highest-grossing film of 2008. Ledger's posthumous Oscar drove massive turnout.
Jurassic Park cost $63 million one of the lowest budgets for any billion-dollar film. Its budget-to-box-office ratio of 16:1 makes it one of the most profitable ever.

The MCU has earned over $29 billion across 33 films. The DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films. Endgame alone earned more than the entire Snyder trilogy.

entries.title: This box office record still stands: Avatar Is the Highest-Grossing Film
entries.hook: This box office record still stands:
stories: Avatar earned $2.92 billion worldwide the highest-grossing film ever. It held the record for a decade until Endgame briefly surpassed it. Avatar regained the title after a 2021 China re-release.
Spider-Man No Way Home earned $1.9 billion during COVID-19. It was the first film to cross $1 billion since 2019 saving theater chains on the verge of closing.
The MCU has earned over $29 billion across 33 films. The DCEU earned about $6 billion across 15 films. Endgame alone earned more than the entire Snyder trilogy.

entries.title: This box office record still stands: John Carter Biggest Bomb
entries.hook: This box office record still stands:
stories: John Carter cost $350 million but earned only $284 million. Disney lost an estimated $200 million making it the biggest box office bomb in history.
Gone With the Wind earned $393 million in 1939. Adjusted for inflation that is approximately $4.3 billion today making it the highest-grossing film of all time.
Spider-Man No Way Home earned $1.9 billion during COVID-19. It was the first film to cross $1 billion since 2019 saving theater chains on the verge of closing.

entries.title: The numbers behind this film are insane: John Carter Biggest Bomb
entries.hook: The numbers behind this film are insane:
stories: John Carter cost $350 million but earned only $284 million. Disney lost an estimated $200 million making it the biggest box office bomb in history.
Titanic cost $200 million the most expensive film ever at the time. It was predicted to be a disaster but earned $2.2 billion holding the record for 12 years.
The Harry Potter series earned $7.7 billion across 8 films averaging $962 million each. Deathly Hallows Part 2 was the most successful at $1.3 billion.

entries.title: Made on a tiny budget earned millions: No Way Home Saved Theaters
entries.hook: Made on a tiny budget earned millions:
stories: Spider-Man No Way Home earned $1.9 billion during COVID-19. It was the first film to cross $1 billion since 2019 saving theater chains on the verge of closing.
Star Wars The Force Awakens cost $447 million including marketing the most expensive ever. Endgame cost $356 million and Avatar 2 cost $350 million.
In 2020 China's box office surpassed North America for the first time. China earned $2.9 billion vs $2.2 billion. Chinese films now regularly outperform Hollywood in their market.
